(NASDAQ:MRVL) is set to join the S&P 500 later this month. After the company met a key profitability requirement thanks to an AI-fueled rally, S&P ​Dow Jones Indices said […]
content:
Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL ) is one of the 10 Best Performing Growth Stocks So Far in 2026 . On June 5, Reuters reported that Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) is set to join the S&P 500 later this month.

After the company met a key profitability requirement thanks to an AI-fueled rally, S&P ​Dow Jones Indices said the company will be added to the benchmark index before the start of trading on June 22. Following the report, the stock jumped nearly 6% in extended trading.

This comes after Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) reported a GAAP profit in the three months ending in December and over the sum of its most recent four quarters. This helped the company clear a key hurdle that had previously prevented it from being included in the index.

Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) has performed strongly in 2026, with its share price more than tripling. This performance has been supported by a broader rally in chip stocks on expectations for strong AI-related demand. Recently, the stock received a boost after NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang called Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) the “next trillion dollar company.”

In its latest quarterly earnings report, Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) projected that its custom chip business would surpass $10 billion in revenue in fiscal 2029.

Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL) is an American company that develops and produces semiconductors and related technology for various applications, including AI, data centers, compute, networking, and storage infrastructure.

While we acknowledge the potential of MRVL as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock .

chineseTitle: Marvell (MRVL) 将加入标准普尔 500 指数
chineseSummary: Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）是 2026 年迄今为止表现最佳的 10 只成长型股票之一。6 月 5 日，路透社报道 Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）将于本月晚些时候加入标准普尔 500 指数。由于人工智能推动的反弹，该公司满足了关键的盈利能力要求后，标准普尔道琼斯指数表示[...]
chineseContent:
Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）是 2026 年迄今为止表现最佳的 10 只成长型股票之一。 6 月 5 日，路透社报道 Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）将于本月晚些时候加入标准普尔 500 指数。

在该公司因人工智能推动的上涨而满足关键盈利能力要求后，标准普尔道琼斯指数表示，该公司将在 6 月 22 日开始交易前被纳入基准指数。报告发布后，该股在盘后交易中上涨了近 6%。

此前，Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）报告了截至 12 月的三个月以及最近四个季度的 GAAP 利润。这帮助该公司清除了之前阻止其被纳入该指数的一个关键障碍。

Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）在 2026 年表现强劲，股价增长了两倍多。这一表现得到了芯片股因人工智能相关需求强劲的预期而全面上涨的支撑。最近，NVIDIA 公司（纳斯达克股票代码：NVDA）首席执行官黄仁勋将 Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）称为“下一个万亿美元公司”后，该股受到提振。

Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）在其最新季度收益报告中预计，其定制芯片业务到 2029 财年的收入将超过 100 亿美元。

Marvell Technology, Inc.（纳斯达克股票代码：MRVL）是一家美国公司，为各种应用开发和生产半导体及相关技术，包括人工智能、数据中心、计算、网络和存储基础设施。

虽然我们承认 MRVL 作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
